name: create_project
description: Create a new project with optional description and color. Returns the newly created project object with its ID.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The project name (required in request body).

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: The project color code from 0-49 (optional in request body).

parameters.name: parent_id
parameters.description: Parent project ID to create this as a sub-project (optional in request body).
